allow: PowerShell($machine = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\); $user = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $env:Path = "$machine;$user"; Set-Location src-tauri; cargo check 2>&1 | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "$env:TEMP\\cargo_check.txt"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\cargo_check.txt" | Select-String -Pattern "^error" -Context 0,12 | Select-Object -First 80)
